---
title: "Mvuselelo Mathunjwa"
toc: false
about:
  image: mvusmath-gif.github.io/lelo.jpg
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/samanthacsik/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/samanthacsik
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:mathun1@stolaf.edu
---

Hello, it's me. Hello it's me. Hello, it's ME. As you can tell from my introduction, I like Cardi B songs just a bit. My name is Lelo and I am from Eswatini. In my free time, I like to read historical romance manga, watch many different genres of anime (except for the weird ones), and watch other kinds of shows like "The Boys" or "Invincible". I love anything that is pink, green or yellow and I aspire to live in a brown and green house with my brown labrador and my brown cat and my brown horses and my brown cows and brown brown wooden floor.
